title: Reel — video timeline editor
description: In-browser video editor: real media clips (image/video/audio) on a layered multi-track timeline (top row renders frontmost), unified Canvas-2D draw path shared by the live preview and the realtime WebM exporter (with real mixed audio), per-clip trim/speed/reverse, volume/fades/auto-duck, dissolve/wipe/slide transitions, keyframes with easing + animation presets, text styling, color grading, filmstrip thumbnails + waveforms, config-driven resizable workspace layouts, a project-files quick-import pane, draft auto-save, and an editor settings dialog.

peers.reason: host seam (lib/host.ts): toasts, inspector, activity, fs api, responsive hook
